summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PR inventory candidates. No GitHub mutations are allowed by the job. None of the listed PRs has enough complete merge preflight proof for a merge recommendation; #86719 is the only near-merge candidate but still needs live mergeability and Codex /review preflight confirmation. The other PRs are blocked by failed proof, waiting-on-author labels, unresolved review-bot findings, or failing checks.

actions.reason: Do not merge until the contributor branch is refreshed or rechecked, Real behavior proof is green or explicitly waived, and Codex /review preflight is complete.
Maintainer/product judgment is needed on whether to preserve or replace the removed setup commands before any automated repair path is safe.
A narrow repair may be possible, but merge is blocked until the release-evidence target mismatch is fixed, proof is green, and merge preflight is complete.
The PR changes config/default behavior and has failing relevant checks plus unresolved review findings; this needs maintainer direction before automated repair or merge planning.
Near-merge candidate, but the applicator should first refresh live mergeability and run/record Codex /review before merge can be recommended.

needs_human: #85642: decide whether the auth/session setup commands removed by the PR should be restored, replaced, or intentionally removed.
#85663: decide whether the compatibility-impacting config/default narrowing should be repaired in the contributor branch, split, or left for the author.
